pageSubtitle: Live FA client API metrics, process health, and alert thresholds.
primarySinkBody: Production errors and traces go to Sentry when NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN is set. Optional stdout beacons feed Datadog / Grafana Loki / ELK. See docs/MONITORING.md.
sloBreachTitle: SLO breach in this browser session
sloErrorRate: API error rate {{rate}} exceeds threshold {{threshold}} (last 5 minutes).
latencyThreshold: Alert when a call exceeds {{ms}} ms
noSamples: No API samples yet — navigate the admin UI to collect metrics.
grafanaHint: Import monitoring/grafana-fa-dashboard.json into Grafana when scraping FA stdout.
